mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.category_code, f.fun_code, f.fun_name, f.fun_params, f.fun_language, f.fun_return, f.visible, f.default_flag, f.sort, f.create_time, f.create_by, f.update_time, f.update_by, f.remark, f.version FROM fun_function f WHERE f.`status` = 1 AND f.id IN ( #{item} ) AND f.create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND f.create_time <= #{timeTo} AND f.id = #{id} AND f.category_code = #{categoryCode} AND f.fun_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{funCode}, '%') AND f.fun_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{funName}, '%') AND f.fun_language = #{funLanguage} AND f.fun_return = #{funReturn} AND f.visible = #{visible} AND f.default_flag = #{defaultFlag} ORDER BY f.sort ASC, f.id ASC

SELECT id, category_code, fun_code, fun_name, fun_params, fun_language, fun_return, fun_body, fun_desc, default_flag FROM fun_function WHERE `status` = 1 AND visible = 1 AND category_code = #{categoryCode} AND fun_code = #{funCode} AND fun_name = #{funName} AND fun_language = #{funLanguage} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
